title: Detective Conan: Fallen Angel of the Highway Anime Film Stays at #1, 2026 Doraemon Film Drops to #4
content: The film sold 2,318,009 tickets and earned 3,502,137,800 yen (about US$21.9 million) in its first three days, making a new opening-weekend record for the franchise , and debuting at #1 at the Japanese box office.
author: ANN

title: Berserk Fans up in Arms Following AI Controversy
content: It’s been over half a year since we last heard from Berserk’s manga, and even longer since we last saw the Band of the Hawk on the small screen. Unfortunately, following the release of chapter 383 in Japan, manga readers have yet to learn when the next installment will finally be printed.
author: ComicBook

title: Live-Action Blue Lock Film Unveils More Cast, New Trailer
content: The staff for the live-action film based on Muneyuki Kaneshiro and Yūsuke Nomura 's BLUE LOCK soccer manga announced on Thursday that Mei Hata will play Anri Teieri, and also revealed a new trailer.
author: ANN

title: Tomohiro Yagi Launches New Hitoner Manga
content: Tomohiro Yagi launched the new manga Hitoner on Shueisha 's Shonen Jump+ platform on Wednesday. The series follows a lone Earthling who visits a distant star occupied by animal-like people and the heartwarming cross-species interactions.
author: ANN

title: My Wife Has No Emotion Author Jirō Sugiura Launches New Kamibiki no Monarch Manga
content: Jirō Sugiura announced on Tuesday that Rei Okiumi ( Ubaumono, Ubawarerumono ) will launch a new manga of his Kamibiki no Monarch (The God Tier Pull Monarch) series in Shogakukan 's Shounen Sunday magazine on April 28. Sugiura is writing the story, and Okiumi is drawing the art.
author: ANN

title: AnimEigo Reveals Hotori: Simply Wishing for Hope Anime's English Dub Trailer, June 9 BD Release
content: AnimEigo announced on Tuesday that its physical Blu-ray Disc release of the Hotori: Simply Wishing for Hope ( Hotori - Tada Saiwai o Koinegau ) anime special will ship on June 9. Pre-orders for the Blu-ray Disc are open now. The company is producing an English dub with SkySet Entertainment .
author: ANN

title: Anime Central Hosts Music Producers/Performers Taku Takahashi, Hidefumi Kenmochi, kors K, BANVOX, Souichi Terada
content: • Taku Takahashi (producer of hip hop group m-flo, composer of Panty & Stocking with Garterbelt and Space Dandy, performer for Hyōge Mono theme song, arranger for various anime theme songs, pictured right) • Hidefumi Kenmochi (producer of Wednesday Campanella, composer for various theme songs from Ranma ½, Chibi…
author: ANN

title: Cupid Parasite Game Gets PC Release
content: Idea Factory International announced on Wednesday that it will release the Cupid Parasite otome visual novel on PC via Steam in 2026, which marks its first otome release on the platform since 2018. The company streamed an announcement trailer: The otome game centers on the heroine, the goddess of love Cupid.
author: ANN

title: Chainsaw Man: Reze Arc Stage Play Reveals Cast, Trailer, Dates
content: The official website for CHAINSAW MAN THE STAGE , the stage play adaptation of Tatsuki Fujimoto 's Chainsaw Man manga, revealed on Thursday the cast, trailer, visual, and dates for CHAINSAW MAN THE STAGE Reze-hen , the second stage play adapting the manga's Reze Arc.
author: ANN

title: Naruto Teases Big Announcements For This Summer
content: While the Naruto franchise has handed off the ninja baton to the next generation thanks to Boruto: Two Blue Vortex , the anime series has been missing in action for years. Following the fight against Code, Boruto and the Hidden Leaf Village have been absent from the screen, with Studio Pierrot focusing more on Bleach:…
author: ComicBook
